auth.label: API Key
auth.description: IP2WHOIS API key passed with the key query parameter. Register for a free account to get your key: https://www.ip2location.io/ip2whois-documentation

actions.name: lookup_domain
actions.description: Look up WHOIS registration details for a domain.

domain.description: The bare domain name to query.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a domain WHOIS lookup.

domain_id.description: Domain registry identifier returned by IP2WHOIS.

status.description: Domain status returned by the WHOIS record.

create_date.description: Domain creation date in ISO 8601 format.

update_date.description: Domain update date in ISO 8601 format.

expire_date.description: Domain expiration date in ISO 8601 format.

domain_age.description: Age of the domain in days.

whois_server.description: WHOIS server hostname for the domain.

name.description: Contact name from the WHOIS record.

organization.description: Organization name from the WHOIS record.

street_address.description: Street address from the WHOIS record.

city.description: City value from the WHOIS record.

region.description: Region, state, or province from the WHOIS record.

zip_code.description: Postal code from the WHOIS record.

country.description: Two-letter country code from the WHOIS record.

phone.description: Phone number from the WHOIS record.

fax.description: Fax number from the WHOIS record.

email.description: Email address from the WHOIS record.

actions.name: lookup_hosted_domains
actions.description: List hosted domains associated with an IP address.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to query.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a hosted domains lookup.

per_page.description: Number of domains returned per page.

total_domains.description: Total number of domains hosted on the IP.

outputSchema.description: Hosted domains lookup result for an IP address.
